title: Saeima strategic communications conference to draw on Ukrainian expertise
summary_full: Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, will host a conference on Friday, May 8th, titled "Comprehensive Defence Concept: Strategic Communication for Societal Resilience", in which Ukrainian army and strategic communication experts will share their experience on the importance of strategic communication in strengthening societal resilience, and MPs and experts from Latvia will discuss the lessons from Ukraine for Latvia.
